query:
-- Create saved_searches table if not exists
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `saved_searches` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `keywords` text NOT NULL,
  `keywordMode` enum('AND','OR') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OR',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

-- Add new columns to kols table if they don't exist
ALTER TABLE `kols`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `avgViews` decimal(14,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `totalCampaignPosts` int DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `totalKolPosts` int DEFAULT 0;

-- Create saved_searches table if not exists
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `saved_searches` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `keywords` text NOT NULL,
  `keywordMode` enum('AND','OR') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OR',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

-- Add new columns to kols table if they don't exist
ALTER TABLE `kols`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `avgViews` decimal(14,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `totalCampaignPosts` int DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `totalKolPosts` int DEFAULT 0;
